title: Father-diagnosed with Stage IV colon cancer. Im terrified.
body:
I am shaking as im writing this. Yesterday my father was diagnosed with stage IV colon cancer that has metastasized to his liver. The oncologists basically said there is no cure but chemotherapy can be administered for palliative care. I refuse to just give up. He has lost a substantial amount of weight over the past year so he is very weak and thin and I am concerned about how his body will handle the harshness of chemo. 

I've started doing some research and I've read a few promising testimonials on the effects and benefits of giving him raw carrot juice daily,  approximately 64 ounces a day. 

I'm so scared and I don't know what to do or where to begin. Any advice is appreciated.
